Objective: Verify successful SMS sending through API endpoint
Pre-conditions:
1. Valid API credentials
2. SMS plan with available credits
3. Test phone number
Test Steps:
1. Authenticate with valid API credentials
2. Call /messages/send-sms endpoint with valid payload
3. Include required parameters: to, from, body
4. Submit request
5. Verify response status
Expected Results:
1. API returns 200 status code
2. Response includes message_id
3. SMS is queued for delivery
4. Credits are deducted from account

Objective: Verify proper error handling when required fields are missing
Pre-conditions:
1. Valid API credentials
2. SMS plan active
Test Steps:
1. Authenticate with valid API credentials
2. Call /messages/send-sms endpoint
3. Omit 'to' field from payload
4. Submit request
5. Repeat with missing 'from' field
6. Repeat with missing 'body' field
Expected Results:
1. API returns 400 Bad Request
2. Error message clearly indicates missing field
3. No credits deducted
4. No message sent

Objective: Verify API properly validates authentication credentials
Pre-conditions: 1. Valid and invalid API credentials available
Test Steps:
1. Attempt API call without authentication header
2. Verify 401 Unauthorized response
3. Attempt API call with invalid API key
4. Verify 401 Unauthorized response
5. Use valid credentials
6. Verify 200 success response
Expected Results:
1. Unauthenticated requests rejected with 401
2. Invalid credentials rejected with 401
3. Error messages don't leak sensitive info
4. Valid credentials allow access

Objective: Verify API response times meet SLA requirements
Pre-conditions:
1. SMS plan with credits
2. Performance testing tools
Test Steps:
1. Send 10 SMS API requests sequentially
2. Measure response time for each
3. Calculate average response time
4. Send 5 concurrent requests
5. Measure concurrent response times
Expected Results:
1. Average response time < 500ms
2. 95th percentile < 1000ms
3. Concurrent requests handled properly
4. No timeouts or failures

Objective: Verify SMS changes didn't break existing email functionality
Pre-conditions:
1. Valid email API credentials
2. Email plan active
Test Steps:
1. Authenticate with valid credentials
2. Send test email via /messages/send endpoint
3. Verify email delivery
4. Check email rendering
5. Verify tracking works
Expected Results:
1. Email sends successfully
2. Email renders correctly
3. Tracking pixels work
4. No regression in email functionality

Objective: Verify SMS dashboard displays correctly in Chrome browser
Pre-conditions:
1. Chrome browser (latest version)
2. SMS plan active
3. SMS usage data
Test Steps:
1. Open Chrome browser
2. Navigate to /sms/dashboard
3. Verify page layout loads correctly
4. Check SMS usage meter displays
5. Verify credit information shows
6. Test responsive behavior
Expected Results:
1. Dashboard loads without errors
2. SMS meter displays accurately
3. All UI elements properly positioned
4. Responsive layout works correctly
5. No console errors

Objective: Verify warning appears when SMS credits run low
Pre-conditions: 1. SMS plan with less than 10% credits remaining
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to SMS dashboard
2. Check for low credit warning banner
3. Verify warning message is clear
4. Click upgrade/add credits button
5. Verify proper navigation
Expected Results:
1. Warning banner displays prominently
2. Message clearly indicates low credits
3. Call-to-action button works
4. User can easily add more credits

Objective: Verify SMS can be scheduled for future delivery
Pre-conditions:
1. Valid API credentials
2. SMS plan with credits
Test Steps:
1. Call SMS API with scheduled_time parameter
2. Set time for 1 hour in future
3. Submit request
4. Verify scheduling confirmation
5. Wait and verify delivery at scheduled time
Expected Results:
1. API accepts scheduled_time parameter
2. SMS queued with scheduled status
3. SMS delivered at correct time
4. Credits deducted at send time

Objective: Verify SMS sends properly integrate with CRM contact records
Pre-conditions:
1. CRM contacts available
2. SMS plan active
3. Test contact with phone number
Test Steps:
1. Select contact from CRM
2. Initiate SMS send to contact
3. Verify phone number auto-populated
4. Send SMS
5. Check CRM for activity record
Expected Results:
1. Contact phone number used correctly
2. SMS activity logged in CRM
3. Contact record updated with interaction
4. Timeline shows SMS send event

Objective: Verify SMS dashboard is accessible via screen reader
Pre-conditions:
1. Screen reader software (NVDA/JAWS)
2. SMS dashboard access
Test Steps:
1. Enable screen reader
2. Navigate to SMS dashboard
3. Tab through all elements
4. Verify announcements for each section
5. Test form inputs for labels
6. Verify meter values announced
Expected Results:
1. All elements have accessible names
2. Form fields properly labeled
3. Meter values announced correctly
4. Logical tab order maintained
5. No accessibility errors

Objective: Verify API validates from_number parameter correctly
Pre-conditions: 1. SMS plan with multiple from_numbers configured
Test Steps:
1. Send SMS with valid from_number
2. Verify successful send
3. Send SMS with non-existent from_number
4. Verify error response
5. Send SMS with unauthorized from_number
6. Verify rejection
Expected Results:
1. Valid from_number accepted
2. Invalid from_number returns 400 error
3. Unauthorized from_number returns 403 error
4. Error messages are clear and helpful

Objective: Verify proper handling when SMS quota is exceeded
Pre-conditions: 1. SMS plan with 0 credits remaining or at limit
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to send SMS with exhausted quota
2. Verify API response
3. Check error message content
4. Verify no message sent
5. Check dashboard shows quota status
Expected Results:
1. API returns 429 or appropriate error
2. Error message explains quota exceeded
3. No message sent or queued
4. Dashboard shows quota limit reached
5. User prompted to upgrade or add credits

Objective: Verify system handles bulk SMS sends efficiently
Pre-conditions:
1. SMS plan with sufficient credits
2. Bulk send capability
Test Steps:
1. Prepare 100 SMS messages
2. Submit bulk send request
3. Monitor processing time
4. Verify all messages queued
5. Check system resource usage
Expected Results:
1. Bulk request processes within 5 seconds
2. All 100 messages queued successfully
3. No system performance degradation
4. Proper queue management

Objective: Verify webhook functionality not affected by SMS changes
Pre-conditions:
1. Webhook configured for message events
2. Test endpoint available
Test Steps:
1. Configure webhook for sent events
2. Send test SMS
3. Verify webhook triggered
4. Check webhook payload
5. Verify all expected data present
Expected Results:
1. Webhook fires for SMS events
2. Payload includes all required data
3. Webhook timing is appropriate
4. No regression in webhook functionality
